rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"lesson","text":"New integration test files must pass linting before the task is considered complete — lint errors count as failures in review.","scope":"tests/int"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"When a unit test file is planned (e.g. withAuth.test.ts) but not created, the task is not done even if integration tests pass.","scope":"auth"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Pre-existing typecheck errors in other files can cause a task to fail review even if the new code is correct.","scope":"typecheck"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Integration test files live under tests/int/ and must co-exist with any planned unit tests in src/ to be considered complete.","scope":"tests/int"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Failing tests in tests/int/api.int.spec.ts that appear unrelated still cause review FAIL if the task modified files in the same directory.","scope":"tests/int/api.int.spec.ts"}]}
